pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Lemonade is a local AI server that exposes optimized LLMs through OpenAI / Anthropic / Ollama compatible APIs, running inference on AMD NPU and GPU. The C++ server core (lemond, lemonade-server) is packaged here without the Tauri desktop wrapper; the bundled web frontend is available behind USE=webui, and the Tauri wrapper stays CMake-toggleable and can be added behind a USE flag later if needed.
Pairs with sci-ml/fastflowlm to drive the AMD Ryzen AI XDNA2 NPU backend.

use.flag: Pull in sci-ml/fastflowlm as the NPU backend
Install OpenRC init.d/conf.d files for a supervise-daemon-managed service
Reuse the system sci-ml/kokoros (/usr/bin/koko) for the Kokoro TTS backend instead of fetching an upstream prebuilt binary at runtime

Reuse the system sci-misc/llama-cpp (/usr/bin/llama-server) for the llama.cpp backend instead of fetching an upstream prebuilt binary at runtime; build it with your preferred GPU backend (see the post-install notes)

Reuse the system sci-misc/stable-diffusion-cpp (/usr/bin/sd-server) for the stable-diffusion.cpp backend instead of fetching an upstream prebuilt binary at runtime; build it with your preferred GPU backend (see the post-install notes)

Reuse the system app-accessibility/whisper-cpp (/usr/bin/whisper-server) for the whisper.cpp backend instead of fetching an upstream prebuilt binary at runtime; build it with your preferred GPU backend (see the post-install notes)
Keep upstream's systemd units (lemond.service, system + user), running as a dedicated acct-user/lemonade
Build the bundled React web frontend (served by lemond at the server root) via net-libs/nodejs; runs npm/webpack over the network at build time. Without it lemond serves a static placeholder page
